creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Created attachment 192445
Update to 4.0.9 and fix building against external Lua/LuaJIT

Redis version 4.0.9 adds a few interesting new features and fixes a very
critical bug regarding the Append Only File.

For full details see the release notes:
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/antirez/redis/4.0/00-RELEASENOTES
